name: frGetFrameCRC
title: frGetFrameCRC
description: This function returns the CRC of a received FlexRay frame.
The Header CRC can be determined with a special selector of the event procedure.

parameters.name: this
parameters.description: The function can only be used in the context of the following event procedures:

return:
Frame CRC (data type WORD).
The return value is only valid if the frame was received by a Vector FlexRay hardware interface in asynchronous monitor mode. In any other case 0 will be sent back.

description: The following example writes the CRC into the Write Window for all received frames.
